component.name: CardHorizontal
component.description: A horizontal course card (thumbnail-left layout) with an 80×80px square thumbnail and a content column (title, optional ProgressBar, metadata row with duration and certified badge). Two colour contexts: default (light) and inverted (dark footer) via the variant prop. For vertical image-top course cards use CardVertical; for generic surface containers use Card.
component.figmaNodeId: none — no Figma component set exists

when: Listing started or saved courses in the User Settings page
Displaying course recommendations in a footer or sidebar with an inverted dark background

antiPatterns.reason: Creates doubled surface depth that loses hierarchy meaning.
antiPatterns.alternative: Place CardHorizontal directly in a Stack or Inline layout.

antiPatterns.scenario: Mixing CardHorizontal and CardVertical in the same list
antiPatterns.reason: Inconsistent layout direction breaks visual rhythm in a list or grid.
antiPatterns.alternative: Pick one orientation for a given context: CardVertical for catalog grids, CardHorizontal for compact lists and footers.

antiPatterns.scenario: Using CardHorizontal for non-course content (e.g., user profile, article)
antiPatterns.reason: The fixed 80×80 thumbnail and metadata row are designed for course items.
antiPatterns.alternative: Use Card with a custom inner layout for other content types.

purpose.default: Standard light-theme context. Text uses default and subtle color tokens.
purpose.inverted: Inverted-background context within the light theme (e.g. the dark footer section). Switches title to color.text.inverted.default and metadata to color.text.inverted.subtle. The parent container must supply the dark background via color.background.container.inverted — do NOT use data-theme='dark'.

states.description: Static display card — no interactive states.

ariaAttributes: thumbnailAlt (pass a meaningful description of the course image, or empty string if the title already provides context)

compositionPatterns.name: started-courses-list
compositionPatterns.description: A vertical Stack of CardHorizontal items showing in-progress courses.

compositionPatterns.name: footer-recommendations
compositionPatterns.description: CardHorizontal items in inverted variant inside the dark footer section. The Box provides the inverted background color; no theme switch is needed — both parent and cards stay in the light theme.
